description: Dr. Henry Smith Clinic was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: to provide accessible, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care to the New York community.
What started as a small practice has grown into a trusted wellness center, helping over 1,000 patients achieve better health naturally.
clinic.environment: Our clinic provides a peaceful, welcoming environment designed to promote relaxation and healing. From the moment you enter, you'll feel the difference - calming colors, comfortable treatment rooms, and a warm, friendly atmosphere that puts patients at ease.

journey.story:
Founded in 2010, TCM Network emerged from Dr. Henry Smith's vision to bring authentic Traditional Chinese Medicine to the heart of New York City. After completing his doctoral studies in San Francisco, Dr. Smith recognized the growing need for holistic healthcare that treats not just symptoms, but the whole person. He established our clinic as a sanctuary where ancient wisdom meets modern life, serving New York's diverse community with the same reverence for healing that has guided TCM practitioners for thousands of years.

Over the past 14 years, we've become deeply rooted in the New York community, treating patients from all walks of life who seek natural, effective solutions for their health concerns. Our practice has grown through word-of-mouth referrals and the trust of families who have experienced the profound healing potential of Chinese medicine. We've witnessed countless transformations as patients rediscover their vitality through acupuncture, herbal medicine, and other time-tested modalities.

Today, TCM Network stands as a bridge between East and West, honoring the classical traditions of Chinese medicine while serving the fast-paced lifestyle of New Yorkers. Our commitment remains unchanged: to provide personalized, compassionate care that addresses the root causes of illness and supports each patient's journey toward optimal health and wellbeing.
journey.title: My Journey to Chinese Medicine

profile.bio:
Dr. Henry Smith, L.Ac., NCCAOM, brings a rare combination of classical TCM training and deep clinical experience to his practice in New York. After earning his Master's and Doctoral degrees in Traditional Chinese Medicine from the American College of Traditional Chinese Medicine in San Francisco, Dr. Smith has dedicated over 16 years to mastering the art and science of Chinese healing. His board certification through NCCAOM reflects his commitment to the highest standards of practice and patient safety.

Dr. Smith specializes in pain management, mental health support, women's health, anxiety and panic disorders, respiratory conditions, and immune system strengthening. His approach combines classical diagnostic techniques like pulse and tongue analysis with modern understanding of how TCM can complement conventional medicine. Fluent in both English and Chinese, Dr. Smith has studied with renowned masters and continues to deepen his knowledge of herbal formulations, acupuncture point combinations, and the subtle energetics that make TCM so uniquely effective.

At the heart of Dr. Smith's practice is his belief that every patient carries within them an innate wisdom for healing. His gentle yet precise needle technique, combined with carefully crafted herbal prescriptions, helps restore the natural flow of qi and blood throughout the body's meridian system. Whether treating chronic pain, emotional imbalances, or complex health conditions, Dr. Smith takes time to understand each patient's constitution and life circumstances, creating truly personalized treatment plans that honor both the individual and the timeless principles of Chinese medicine.

> True healing occurs when we restore harmony between the mind, body, and spirit, allowing your innate wisdom to flourish.

**Dr. Henry Smith**
profile.name: Dr. Henry Smith
profile.title: L.Ac., NCCAOM

philosophy.title: Treatment Philosophy

principles.title: Treat the Whole Person
principles.description: TCM recognizes that physical symptoms are often connected to emotional, mental, and spiritual factors. Dr. Henry Smith addresses all aspects of health, not just isolated symptoms.

principles.title: Find the Root Cause
principles.description: Rather than merely suppressing symptoms, treatment focuses on identifying and addressing the underlying imbalances that create disease. This approach leads to lasting results.

principles.title: Personalized Care
principles.description: No two patients are alike. Each treatment plan is carefully customized based on your unique constitution, health history, and current condition.

principles.title: Patient Education
principles.description: Understanding your body and condition empowers you to take an active role in your healing. Dr. Henry Smith takes time to explain your diagnosis and treatment in clear, accessible terms.

principles.title: Integration with Western Medicine
principles.description: TCM can work beautifully alongside conventional medical care. Dr. Henry Smith collaborates with other healthcare providers to ensure comprehensive, coordinated treatment.

principles.title: Prevention & Wellness
principles.description: The best medicine prevents illness before it occurs. Treatment includes guidance on diet, lifestyle, and self-care practices to maintain long-term health.

philosophy.introduction: Dr. Henry Smith's approach to healing is rooted in the fundamental principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while incorporating modern clinical understanding.

specializations.title: Areas of Specialization
specializations.description: Through years of clinical practice and continuing education, Dr. Henry Smith has developed particular expertise in several key areas:

items: Classical Chinese Herbal Medicine seminars with Dr. Heiner Fruehauf
Annual attendance at national TCM conferences
Regular study groups with local TCM practitioners
30+ hours of continuing education annually (required: 30 hours every 3 years)
